/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/vdb_print.dir/main.cc.o -o ../../../Dist/vdb_print  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/PicoGKRuntime/build/openvdb/openvdb/openvdb:/usr/local/lib: ../../openvdb/openvdb/libopenvdb.so.11.0.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbbmalloc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so /usr/local/lib/libblosc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_iostreams.so.1.83.0
